channel.title: Music on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Music on Arrans github.io

item.title: KRTirtho/spotube
item.description: 🎧 Open source music streaming app! Available for both desktop & mobile!

item.title: dweymouth/supersonic
item.description: A lightweight and full-featured cross-platform desktop client for self-hosted music servers

item.title: imputnet/cobalt
item.description: best way to save what you love

item.title: FoxxMD/multi-scrobbler
item.description: Scrobble plays from multiple sources to multiple clients

item.title: spotDL/spotify-downloader
item.description: Download your Spotify playlists and songs along with album art and metadata (from YouTube if a match is found).

item.title: spotify/basic-pitch
item.description: A lightweight yet powerful audio-to-MIDI converter with pitch bend detection

item.title: gabehf/Koito
item.description: Koito is a modern, themeable scrobbler that you can use with any program that scrobbles to a custom ListenBrainz URL

item.title: tranxuanthang/lrcget
item.description: Utility for mass-downloading LRC synced lyrics for your offline music library.

item.title: suitux/Tagr
item.description: Self-hosted web app for browsing, playing, and editing music file metadata. Features a three-panel UI to navigate your library, listen to tracks, and write tag changes directly back to audio files. Built with Next.js, React, Prisma + SQLite, and node-taglib-sharp.

item.title: aleksey-saenko/MusicRecognizer
item.description: An open-source Android app for music recognition that integrates AudD, ACRCloud, and Shazam to perform song identification.

item.title: Shabinder/SpotiFlyer
item.description: Kotlin Multiplatform Music Downloader, Supports Spotify / Gaana / Youtube Music / Jio Saavn / SoundCloud.

item.title: ubuntu-flutter-community/musicpod
item.description: Music, radio, television and podcast player for Ubuntu, MacOs and maybe soon Android
